hooks.prompt: A git commit is about to run. List staged Java files with: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR | grep -E '\.java$'. If the result is empty, return {"ok": true, "notes": "No Java files staged"} immediately without further checks. Otherwise, for each staged Java file: read the file content and call mcp__alibaba-java-guidelines__review_code_snippet on it. Aggregate all findings (rule IDs + severity + file:line). Return {"ok": false, "reason": "Alibaba violations: [summary]"} if any BLOCKER/CRITICAL violations are found; otherwise return {"ok": true, "notes": "[summary or 'No violations']"}. The commit input is: $ARGUMENTS.
hooks.statusMessage: Reviewing staged Java files against Alibaba Java guidelines...
